name: Cass City Public Park
description: Cass City Public Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cass City, MI. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
hours: Monday-Friday Office Hours: 8:00am-4:30pm Lobby Hours: 9:00am-4:00pm Closed Daily From 12:00-1:00pm Phone: 989-872-2911 Copyright 2026 ©Village of Cass City.
